space_position.notes: Exact column depends on full-justification spacing. Test col 24, 25, and 26.

traversal_patterns.description: Spiral clockwise outward from space position. Record order of encountering K4 chars.
Spiral counter-clockwise outward from space position.
Spiral clockwise from grid boundary inward toward space.
Boustrophedon (serpentine) traversal starting at space, alternating row direction.
Diagonal sweep NE then wrap, from space position.
Diagonal sweep NW then wrap, from space position.
Complete each row before moving to next, starting at space row. Row 13 first (rightward from space), then row 14, then row 12, expanding outward.
Complete each column before moving to next, starting at space column. Col ~25 first (downward from space), then col 26, then col 24, expanding outward.
Visit cells in order of Manhattan distance from space. Ties broken by row-first then col-first.
Visit cells in order of Euclidean distance from space. Ties broken by angle.

params.notes: Space only exists in pass 1 (row 13). The traversal produces a permutation of positions 0-96 for K4. After transposition, apply substitution with Vigenere/Beaufort/VarBeau using coordinate-derived key (from H4 formulas, or fixed keyword KRYPTOS). Total: 10 traversals x 3 space_cols x 2 reversal x 3 variants = 180 configs. Since space is pass1-only, pass2 is not applicable for anchor-based traversal.
